attributes.additional_details: Kemonomimi are human characters who have animal ears. This is almost always paired with an animal tail as well, though this is not required. They are usually designed with animal ears attached to the top or sides of the head of a human-shaped character. Adding animal ears to a character gives them a cute or pet-like image
attributes.background: A month to celebrate the kemonomimis in the UK. For the people who identify completely differently
